summary: coral-wraith postinstall exfiltrates host info via HTTP
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on `npm install` and uses Node's built-in `http`, `os`, and `child_process` modules to collect host information (including `os.hostname()`) and transmit it via outbound HTTP requests. The combination of a lifecycle-hook auto-execution, host identifier collection, and an outbound HTTP channel matches the system-information exfiltration pattern characteristic of supply-chain reconnaissance/beacon malware. There is no legitimate purpose for a package's postinstall to harvest host identifiers and beacon them outward.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
